Source: AgentCore API Reference
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/APIReference/API_Operations.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane API

## API Operations (37 total)

### Memory Management
- BatchCreateMemoryRecords, BatchDeleteMemoryRecords, BatchUpdateMemoryRecords
- DeleteMemoryRecord, GetMemoryRecord, ListMemoryRecords, RetrieveMemoryRecords
- StartMemoryExtractionJob, ListMemoryExtractionJobs

### Agent & Runtime
- InvokeAgentRuntime, GetAgentCard
- GetWorkloadAccessToken (multiple variants)

### Browser Session Management
- StartBrowserSession, StopBrowserSession, GetBrowserSession
- ListBrowserSessions, SaveBrowserSessionProfile, UpdateBrowserStream

### Code Interpreter
- StartCodeInterpreterSession, StopCodeInterpreterSession
- GetCodeInterpreterSession, ListCodeInterpreterSessions, InvokeCodeInterpreter

### Event Management
- CreateEvent, DeleteEvent, GetEvent, ListEvents

### Authentication & Access
- CompleteResourceTokenAuth, GetResourceApiKey, GetResourceOauth2Token

### Actor & Session Management
- ListActors, ListSessions, StopRuntimeSession
